title: Frontend Batch 11 - Helper Edge Case Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced helper edge cases for search normalization, revalidation paths, content parsing, SEO metadata, public detail date/content helpers, WorkVideo embeds, and YouTube thumbnail ID parsing.
behaviorBugsFound: Malformed page content JSON could throw parser errors.
Malformed percent-encoded public revalidation paths could throw URI errors.
Encoded slash detail segments could reach public revalidation tag mapping.
Invalid blog/work detail dates rendered Invalid Date.
Work detail content parsing could return non-string renderable output.
Blank SEO titles and whitespace social images were preserved in metadata.
YouTube watch URLs with v after another query parameter were not recognized.

validation.command: npx skills find "typescript helper parsing seo testing"
validation.notes: Low-install external skills found; no skill installed.

validation.command: npm test -- --run src/test/normalized-search.test.ts src/test/public-revalidation-paths.test.ts src/test/blog-content.test.ts src/test/page-content.test.ts src/test/seo-metadata.test.ts src/test/work-detail-metadata.test.ts src/test/public-detail-helper-edge-cases.test.ts src/test/work-video-embeds.test.ts src/test/work-thumbnail-resolution.test.ts
validation.result: failed before fixes, passed after fixes

remainingGaps: Public list/card date formatting helpers remain component-local.
Sitemap date fallback behavior remains untested at the helper level.
HTML sanitizer edge cases were not expanded in this batch.
WorkVideo player runtime fallback remains component-level rather than helper-owned.
recommendation: Proceed to a focused frontend security/sanitization or sitemap/metadata helper batch.
